agreement.title: Partner Agreement
agreement.subtitle: Please review and accept the agreement before continuing.
agreement.accountText: By registering as an ORIGIN Partner, you confirm that all information provided is accurate, complete, and up to date.
agreement.productText: You agree to maintain product quality standards and ensure that all products listed on the platform are genuine and accurately represented.
agreement.orderText: Partners are responsible for processing and fulfilling customer orders promptly while maintaining a positive customer experience.
agreement.businessText: You are responsible for keeping your store details, contact information, operating hours, and product inventory accurate and up to date.
agreement.policyText: All partners must comply with ORIGIN policies, applicable laws, and future guidelines communicated by the platform.
agreement.paymentText: Payments will be processed only to the verified bank account provided during registration.
agreement.suspensionText: ORIGIN reserves the right to suspend or terminate partner accounts that violate platform policies.
agreement.infoBox: Once accepted, this agreement remains valid unless updated by ORIGIN. Any future changes will be communicated to partners.
agreement.checkboxTitle: I agree to the ORIGIN Partner Agreement
agreement.checkboxText: You must accept the agreement before continuing.
